## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] Wheel install/import smoke test completed when package metadata, public APIs, CLI, or reporting changed.

## Core Boundaries

- [ ] No Selenium, Playwright, Appium, requests, httpx, driver/client/session objects, or framework-specific code was added to core.
- [ ] Any framework-specific behavior remains in web, mobile, or API adapters/wrappers.
- [ ] Setup, reports, CI, version, and release impact is documented or explicitly not applicable.
